scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every documented Weatherstack endpoint (current, historical incl. its date-range time-series mode, forecast, marine, autocomplete) is now covered_by a stream. Weatherstack's semicolon-separated 'bulk' query capability (documented at weatherstack.com/documentation's Bulk Queries section) is not a distinct endpoint/path — it is a caller-supplied value SHAPE on the existing query parameter of current/historical/forecast/marine, so it needs no separate api_surface.json entry; a caller may already pass a semicolon-joined query value through config.query today. Weatherstack has no write/mutation endpoints at all (a read-only weather-data API), so capabilities.write stays false and this bundle ships no writes.json.
